message:
deps: refresh lockfile to latest resolvable crate versions

Update Cargo.lock to reflect current dependency resolution (+94/-29
lines). This lockfile-only change picks up patch updates and security
fixes across the transitive dependency tree without any source code
modifications.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
